profile.name: Hrithik Jain
profile.headline: Product Manager with ~4 years of experience across B2B and B2C, building high-impact growth, retention, and customer experience products.
profile.summary: I am a product manager with experience across consumer and B2B products, focused on growth, retention, and customer experience. I enjoy working closely with design, engineering, and data teams to ship impactful products.

working_style: Prefers end-to-end ownership of problem statements
Balances user experience with business impact
decision_making: Prioritize based on impact on revenue, retention, or efficiency
Validate ideas through experiments before scaling
Use funnel and cohort analysis to identify drop-offs
Focus on reducing friction across user journeys

key_contributions: Owned end-to-end post-purchase journeys including delivery, returns, exchanges, and customer support
Implemented Kapture bot and ticketing system, increasing automated query resolution from ~20% to ~65%
Built and launched rewards program (Trend Coins)
Designed and shipped referral program driving incremental signups and orders
Led multiple A/B experiments across AOV, prepaid share, margins, and inventory liquidation
Prototyped POS UI and worked closely with engineering on offline rollout
Built end-to-end POS and inventory management system for offline stores
impact: Increased signups by ~12% and daily orders by ~3%
Reduced customer support load via automation

key_contributions: Designed price negotiation workflow improving engagement and acceptance
Led retention initiatives across WhatsApp and chatbot flows
Worked on Spinny Partners onboarding experience
Built standardized car rating system
Optimized interstate delivery flows
Shipped CRM improvements for enterprise clients
Led invoicing module roadmap and execution
Improved reimbursement and expense workflows
Reduced reward abuse using analytics
Built reward reversal workflows
Improved rewards CX
Built brand ranking logic for OTC marketplace
Analyzed ROI of banner placements
Worked with SQL on marketplace data
Built Looker dashboards
Performed cohort analysis
Identified adoption drop-offs

projects.title: Rewards Program (Trend Coins)
projects.problem: Low retention and weak repeat purchase behavior
projects.solution: Built a unified reward currency integrated across user lifecycle
projects.impact: Improved retention, engagement, prepaid adoption, and conversion

projects.title: Referral Program
projects.problem: High CAC and limited organic growth
projects.solution: Built referral loops rewarding both referrer and referee

projects.title: POS & Inventory System
projects.problem: High cost and inefficiencies from third-party tools
projects.solution: Built in-house POS and inventory system

projects.title: Post-Purchase CX & Support Automation
projects.problem: Poor post-purchase experience and high support load
learnings: Automation improves both CX and cost
Tight alignment with support teams is critical

personal: Cricket and following players like Virat Kohli
Learning about startups and scaling businesses
